Calculation.Text: Let ( [ expMode = Case ( ExportMode = "JSON" ; "JSON"; ExportMode = "TEXT" ; "Text JSON"; ExportMode = "Media update" ; "Media-update Text JSON"; ExportMode = "Media all" ; "Media-all Text JSON"); typeOfTask = Case ( Type of task = "sync"; "Content"; Type of task = "publish"; "Code Content"; Type of task = "publish-funkis-cloud"; "Funkis Cloud Delivery" ) ]; typeOfTask & " - " & expMode ) /* jobTypes SCORM_12 SCORM_2004 WEB_LINK XAPI Example "["SCORM_12","XAPI"] typeOfTask sync - syncing new content from FAT to Funkis Cloud server publish - building a new package with both content from FAT and code from GitLab */
